tickets.label: SIP3.13
tickets.title: Funded campaign has no observed reward-token claims
tickets.open_to_investigating_action: Reproduce discrepancy from latest artifacts and confirm root cause.
tickets.investigating_to_resolved_criteria: Observed reward-token claims become non-zero and residual declines with refreshed claim snapshots.
tickets.investigating_to_accepted_risk_criteria: Root cause is structural/non-actionable; document impact and keep monitoring.

tickets.label: SIP3.13
tickets.title: Same-token prior funding overlap limits campaign attribution confidence
tickets.open_to_investigating_action: Reproduce discrepancy from latest artifacts and confirm root cause.
tickets.investigating_to_resolved_criteria: Only if exact campaign-level claim mapping becomes available from new data or protocol changes.
tickets.investigating_to_accepted_risk_criteria: Attribution overlap remains structural; impact disclosed and confidence class remains PARTIAL.

tickets.label: SIP3.13.1
tickets.title: Forum treasury transfer vs on-chain USDC routed into LVUSDC path
tickets.open_to_investigating_action: Reproduce discrepancy from latest artifacts and confirm root cause.
tickets.investigating_to_resolved_criteria: Forum claim and on-chain routing either fully match or residual is explained with source-backed adjustment.
tickets.investigating_to_accepted_risk_criteria: Root cause is structural/non-actionable; document impact and keep monitoring.

tickets.label: aggregate
tickets.title: Realized annualized fee rate deviates from claimed 0.66%
tickets.open_to_investigating_action: Validate resolved evidence artifacts remain reproducible after refresh.
tickets.investigating_to_resolved_criteria: Delta remains within threshold and evidence artifacts are current.

tickets.label: SIP3.13
tickets.title: Forum treasury transfer vs on-chain routed amount
